classObjective: Use the Distance Formula to find the distance between two points in the coordinate plane.
workedExamples: 10-4, Example 1 — Find Segment Lengths on a Number Line
10-4, Example 2 — Determine Whether Segments Are Congruent
10-4, Example 3 — Find the Distance Between Two Points in the Coordinate Plane
warmUp: If point A is at (1, 2) and point B is at (4, 6), what is AB?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: Distance Formula derivation from Pythagorean Theorem; number line distance; congruence check using distance
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice using the Distance Formula to find distances and check congruence
independentPractice: Practice problems using the Distance Formula to calculate distances between points
assessment: Exit ticket: find the distance between (-2, 3) and (4, -1)
capReflection: How is the Distance Formula related to the Pythagorean Theorem?
